attributes.heading: Wilderness First Responder
attributes.bodyHtml:
Wilderness First Responder Hybrid First Aid Course At a glance


TUITION - $706 for members, $756 for non-members

Applications are currently closed. This program isn’t accepting new applications right now — watch the events calendar for the next session.

CLASS SIZE LIMIT - 12 to 24

COURSE DURATION - 5 days / 40 in class hours + 40 hours of additional self guided learning (completed before Feb 10, 2024)

This course will be taught both indoors and outdoors.

Questions?

Not yet a member?

Join Today!

Wilderness First Responder Hybrid First Aid Course

A Certification Course taught by Longleaf Wilderness Medicine

Register now for the February 2024 course!

We must meet a minimum of 12 registrations by Dec 19th for this course to occur.

Wilderness First Responder is the next step in understanding and developing one of the most important skill sets to have in the backcountry.

Wilderness First Responder teaches skills necessary when professional medical help is an indefinite time or distance away.

Environmental aspects of backcountry emergency situations will be covered in detail.

We partner with Longleaf Wilderness Medicine to teach this course over 5 days and 40 additional hours of self guided learning required to be completed before Feb 10th.

Dates -Saturday and Sunday, Feb 10 and 11 and Saturday, Sunday and Monday - Feb 17, 18, and 19 8am-5:30PM Pacific Time

Location - Exact details will be provided upon registration.

Cost - $706 for Spokane Mountaineers members, $756 for non-members (Price includes Longleaf online processing fee of $6.00).

Registration - Registration is open now for Feb 2024. Click here to register . Members can use code SMWFR2024 to receive $50 discount. Membership status will be verified for anyone using this code.
